GuardianApprovalReview.description: [UNSTABLE] Temporary guardian approval review payload used by `item/autoApprovalReview/*` notifications. This shape is expected to change soon.

GuardianApprovalReviewStatus.description: [UNSTABLE] Lifecycle state for a guardian approval review.

GuardianRiskLevel.description: [UNSTABLE] Risk level assigned by guardian approval review.

description:
[UNSTABLE] Temporary notification payload for guardian automatic approval review.

TODO(ccunningham): Attach guardian review state to the reviewed tool item's lifecycle instead of sending separate standalone review notifications so the app-server API can persist and replay review state via `thread/read`.

parentToolItemId.description: Reviewed parent tool item identifier. For direct tool reviews this matches `review_id`; attributed `network_access` reviews may differ, and unattributed `network_access` reviews may omit it.

reviewId.description: Stable guardian review identifier for matching started/completed events.

targetItemId.description: Deprecated alias for `review_id`, retained for backwards compatibility.

title: ItemGuardianApprovalReviewCompletedNotification
